series_metadata.series_description: Record details about the development of Ohio’s plan for creating Ohio Means Jobs Center in local workforce development areas. Ohio Means Jobs Centers are designed to provide training, counseling and employment services to Ohio job seekers and employers under the Wagner-Peyser, Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) and Labor Exchange (LE) programs. Services must address employer needs, be customer focused and accountable. Files should include: grant information, Memorandum of understanding, partner agreements, cost sharing process, allocation plan and all WIOA related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: submittal of final closeout expenditure report that funding period and any audits are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: submittal of final closeout expenditure report that funding period and any audits are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved
